# Story Idea - Level 0
This is the story idea for level 0, the intro chapter.
This is the first chapter of the game, which is a scripted chapter aiming at setting player attributes and deliver narrative experience. An engaging story is essential.
1. Player is chasing by a knight, who is a shadow of "吕布". But player does not know who he is.
2. Player is in a very dangerous situation that he faces fatal challenges several times.
3. Player has to make 5 decitions, each decision has 3 options describing different solutions towards a challenge.
4. Player attr is init as 10/10/10. Each option will change player attrs, usually more than one attr, where there can be plus or minus change. but the total change in most cases should be +1.
5. The decision node, options and attributes change must make sense from narrative point of view.
6. in the end, player will wake up and be aware it is a dream.
